challenges.area: No senior oversight on advertiser output
challenges.impact: The advertiser operates without a clear performance standard or accountability loop — campaigns run but no one is holding results against targets

challenges.area: Coordination bottleneck sits with the owner
challenges.impact: Alessandro spends time managing the advertiser directly, pulling him out of growth work and creating a single point of failure
No consistent process or follow-up — deals stall or go cold because there's no one actively pushing them forward
Without automated reporting, decisions are reactive — no clear view of what's working, what's not, and where to focus

approach.body:
The core problem is structural: Alessandro is doing both the CEO job and the CMO job simultaneously. Coordinating advertisers, reviewing performance, and closing deals all require different bandwidth — and they're all sitting on one person's plate.

The solution is a part-time CMO layer: automated performance visibility, a dedicated point of accountability over the advertiser, and direct sales support on the calls that matter.

items.activity: Automated data pull from Ads Manager via Claude Code
items.benefit: Performance data collected and formatted automatically — no manual exports

items.activity: Weekly report: spend, leads, CPL, ROAS
items.benefit: Alessandro sees exactly where money is going and what it's producing, every week
Not just data — a clear 'here's what to do about it' for the week ahead
Clear brief, targets reviewed, blockers surfaced before they become problems
Advertiser gets structured, data-backed direction — not just gut feedback
Ensures the advertiser is working on the right things, not just busy things

items.activity: Thomas runs the sales calls end-to-end
items.benefit: Alessandro stays focused on delivery — sales is handled by a dedicated closer

items.activity: Alessandro joins 2nd meetings if the client requests it
items.benefit: Owner presence reserved for high-stakes moments only, not every call

investment.roi_framing: One recovered deal or one optimised campaign typically covers the monthly retainer. Senior CMO oversight without the full-time salary.

bonuses.detail: If after the first month it's not the right fit, we part ways cleanly — no lock-in
Questions and decisions don't wait for a scheduled call — respond within 24h on WhatsApp/Slack

next_steps: Confirm — Formal acceptance of this proposal and scope
Payment — First month's retainer to begin
Onboarding — Share access to Ads Manager and any relevant platforms
Kick-off call — 60 minutes to align on advertiser state, pipeline, and priorities before Day 1

terms.detail: Monthly retainer, billed at the start of each month
As defined above. Excluded: ad spend (at client's expense), content production, paid tool subscriptions
30-day written notice required to end the engagement
All dashboards and systems built during the engagement are client property
Ads Manager access required before Day 1
